remarks_html:
Command to bots on your database.

Sends a command in S>C 0x04 BOTNET_COMMAND to all bots on the same database.

If the sending client does not have permission to relay commands to other clients, only the sending client receives the sent command.

The sending client must have write access to the database, or have restricted access and the command match a pre-defined list of acceptable restricted user commands. If the client does not meet the access requirement, no response is generated to any user (including the sender itself).
